_comment: Pipeline LLM CLI bindings. Copy to cli.json and customise. The runner writes the system prompt to {{system_prompt_file}} and the user message to {{user_message_file}}, then spawns cmd with the rendered args. stdout is captured, parsed as JSON, and extract_path (dotted) selects the model's actual text response before that text is JSON-parsed by the runner. Set extract_path to null if the CLI emits the model response directly as plain JSON on stdout. Set retries to N to allow up to N additional attempts (total = 1 + N) on transient failures: for generate that is CLI exit/timeout/non-JSON-stdout/extract_path miss; for judge it additionally covers Zod schema validation of the model's output. Each attempt writes its own logs when retries > 0.

generate.description: Invokes an LLM CLI to produce a Blueprint V2 from a story brief. Receives the generator-prompt.md as system and the brief-wrapped user message as input.

judge.description: Invokes an LLM CLI to judge a single dimension. System prompt is judge-system.md + the dimension definition + the dimension's Zod output schema. User message is the brief + blueprint.
